theorem Trivialization.contMDiffOn.{u_1, u_2, u_4, u_6, u_7, u_8} : ‚ąÄ {n : WithTop ‚Ąē‚ąě} {ūĚēú : Type u_1} {B : Type u_2}
  {F : Type u_4} {E : B ‚Üí Type u_6} [inst : NontriviallyNormedField ūĚēú] {EB : Type u_7} [inst_1 : NormedAddCommGroup EB]
  [inst_2 : NormedSpace ūĚēú EB] {HB : Type u_8} [inst_3 : TopologicalSpace HB] {IB : ModelWithCorners ūĚēú EB HB}
  [inst_4 : TopologicalSpace B] [inst_5 : ChartedSpace HB B] [inst_6 : (x : B) ‚Üí AddCommMonoid (E x)]
  [inst_7 : (x : B) ‚Üí Module ūĚēú (E x)] [inst_8 : NormedAddCommGroup F] [inst_9 : NormedSpace ūĚēú F]
  [inst_10 : TopologicalSpace (TotalSpace F E)] [inst_11 : (x : B) ‚Üí TopologicalSpace (E x)] [inst_12 : FiberBundle F E]
  [inst_13 : VectorBundle ūĚēú F E] [ContMDiffVectorBundle n F E IB] (e : Trivialization F TotalSpace.proj)
  [MemTrivializationAtlas e], ContMDiffOn (IB.prod ūĚďė(ūĚēú, F)) (IB.prod ūĚďė(ūĚēú, F)) n (‚ÜĎe) e.source :=
fun {n} {ūĚēú} {B} {F} {E} [NontriviallyNormedField ūĚēú] {EB} [NormedAddCommGroup EB] [NormedSpace ūĚēú EB] {HB}
    [TopologicalSpace HB] {IB} [TopologicalSpace B] [ChartedSpace HB B] [(x : B) ‚Üí AddCommMonoid (E x)]
    [(x : B) ‚Üí Module ūĚēú (E x)] [NormedAddCommGroup F] [NormedSpace ūĚēú F] [TopologicalSpace (TotalSpace F E)]
    [(x : B) ‚Üí TopologicalSpace (E x)] [FiberBundle F E] [VectorBundle ūĚēú F E] [ContMDiffVectorBundle n F E IB] e
    [MemTrivializationAtlas e] =>
  have this := contMDiffOn_id;
  ContMDiffOn.congr
    (ContMDiffOn.prodMk
      (Eq.mp (congrArg (fun _a => _a) (propext (Trivialization.contMDiffOn_iff (mapsTo_id e.source)))) this).left
      (Eq.mp (congrArg (fun _a => _a) (propext (Trivialization.contMDiffOn_iff (mapsTo_id e.source)))) this).right)
    fun x hx => Eq.symm (Trivialization.mk_proj_snd e hx)
